# GK Hindi Pro

> Best GK in Hindi website with 20,000+ questions for SSC, UPSC, Banking, Railway, CTET. Current Affairs 2025-2026 in Hindi. Free online GK test.

## Overview
GK Hindi Pro is an educational platform designed for students preparing for competitive exams in India. We provide thousands of General Knowledge questions, daily current affairs, and interactive quizzes in Hindi.

## Important Links
- **Home**: [https://gk.moneycal.in/](https://gk.moneycal.in/)
- **India GK**: [https://gk.moneycal.in/india-gk](https://gk.moneycal.in/india-gk)
- **Current Affairs**: [https://gk.moneycal.in/current-affairs](https://gk.moneycal.in/current-affairs)
- **Science GK**: [https://gk.moneycal.in/science-gk](https://gk.moneycal.in/science-gk)
- **Quiz**: [https://gk.moneycal.in/quiz](https://gk.moneycal.in/quiz)
